stemHtml: What is true about a too high solidity due to a too high number of blades?

options.a: Airflow becomes more disruptive for successive blades.
options.b: Airflow becomes less undisruptive for successive blades.
options.c: Due to the increased speed, the airflow may become supersonic forming shockwaves at the tips.
options.d: Due to the increased speed, the airflow may become supersonic forming shockwaves at the spinner.
